description: You are a Data Analyst. The CEO's weekly executive dashboard script (`dashboard_gen.py`) in `/home/ga/PycharmProjects/executive_dashboard` is producing charts with critical errors. Fix the logic in `reporting/data.py` and `reporting/dashboard.py` to resolve issues including alphabetical instead of chronological timeline ordering, overlapping instead of stacked bars in the cost structure chart, Y-axis scale mismatches (Millions vs absolute dollars), and mismatched legend labels in the profit pie chart. Ensure all tests in `tests/test_dashboard.py` pass and generate the corrected `output/dashboard.png` by running `main.py`. Do not hardcode values.
